brackets.open: Captures opening brackets, braces, and quotes
brackets.close: Captures closing brackets, braces, and quotes

indents.indent: Captures entire arrays and objects for indentation
indents.outdent: Captures entire arrays and objects for outdentation

injections.injection.language: Captures the language identifier for a code block
injections.injection.content: Captures the content to be treated as a different language

outline.name: Captures the content of object keys
outline.context: Captures elements that provide context for the outline item
outline.context.extra: Captures additional contextual information for the outline item
outline.open: Captures the opening of the outline item
outline.close: Captures the closing of the outline item
outline.annotation: Captures nodes that annotate the outline item (doc comments, attributes, decorators)

runnables.script: Captures the script name as well (for different purposes)

textobjects.function.around: Captures entire function definitions or equivalent small sections of a file
textobjects.function.inside: Captures function bodies (the stuff within the braces)
textobjects.class.around: Captures entire class definitions or equivalent large sections of a file
textobjects.class.inside: Captures the contents of class definitions
textobjects.comment.around: Captures entire comments (e.g. all adjacent line comments, or block comments)

eq.description: Matches if the capture's text is equal to the provided string or another capture

not-eq.description: Matches if the capture's text is not equal to the provided string or another capture

match.description: Matches if the capture's text matches the provided regular expression

not-match.description: Matches if the capture's text does not match the provided regular expression

any-of.description: Matches if the capture's text is equal to any of the provided strings

any-eq.description: Matches if any node in a quantified capture equals the provided value

any-not-eq.description: Matches if any node in a quantified capture does not equal the provided value

any-match.description: Matches if any node in a quantified capture matches the provided regex

any-not-match.description: Matches if any node in a quantified capture does not match the provided regex

is.description: Asserts that a capture has a given property

is-not.description: Asserts that a capture does not have a given property

set.description: Associates key-value metadata with a pattern or capture

select-adjacent.description: Filters text to preserve only nodes adjacent to another capture

strip.description: Removes text matched by a regular expression from a capture
